summary: Exhaustive competitive landscape research for ThreatGraph. Covers 5 tiers: enterprise platforms (CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, Palo Alto, IBM, Fortinet), cybersecurity AI startups (Hunters.AI, Calmo, Deep Instinct, VulnCheck), MITRE ATT&CK graph database GitHub projects (7 projects analyzed), AI code security tools (Claude Code Security, HexStrike, Strix, SWE-agent, Trail of Bits), and codebase KG tools (GitNexus, Potpie). Includes gap analysis matrix showing no tool combines KG + agent + asset correlation + codebase awareness. Identifies precise MOAT in the schema IP, temporal evolution, and open-source flywheel.
